rows.source_anchor: PDF p257 / IP p11; PDF p265-267 / IP p19-21; PDF p297 / IP p51
rows.source_detail: MP11 says ground, cable, and helicopter harvest methods come from WFP's spatial LBB physical-operability dataset.
rows.extracted_clue: LBB uses LiDAR bare-earth hillshade, canopy height model, slope, streams, professional block/road planning, and post-harvest updates.
rows.public_proxy_use: Do not use as a queryable source; record as private benchmark context.
rows.queryable_or_local_artifact: No public FEMIC-readable LBB layer identified.
rows.p14_followup: Build public proxy assignments and label them as non-equivalent to WFP LBB.
rows.caveat: Aggregate MP11 LBB summaries cannot be reverse-engineered into stand truth.

rows.extracted_clue: MP11 physical classes are conventional, non-conventional, and inoperable; only inoperable is removed from THLB.
rows.public_proxy_use: Use class vocabulary and inoperable/non-conventional distinction.
rows.p14_followup: Map public proxy rows to ground, cable, heli, not_applicable, or review-required.
rows.caveat: MP11 class vocabulary is public; the LBB polygons are not.

rows.extracted_clue: THLB area distribution is 57.3% ground, 39.6% cable, 3.1% non-conventional.
rows.public_proxy_use: Use as aggregate QA target only.
rows.p14_followup: Report assigned-area residuals after public proxy classification.
rows.caveat: Do not force individual stands to match percentages without public evidence.

rows.extracted_clue: Current THLB is 68,845 ha and 19,216,294 m3 ground; 47,524 ha and 14,563,331 m3 cable; 3,730 ha and 2,223,221 m3 non-conventional.
rows.public_proxy_use: Use as area and volume QA target.
rows.p14_followup: Compare proxy area and candidate inventory volume by harvest system.
rows.caveat: Candidate THLB is larger than MP11; residuals must be area-normalized.

rows.extracted_clue: For age >80 years and 0-499 m flight distance: minimum 350 m3/ha and minimum 15% Cw+Fd+Yc.
rows.public_proxy_use: Use if age, volume, species share, and flight/access proxy exist.
rows.p14_followup: P14.3 must build species-share, volume, age, and access-distance proxy fields.
rows.caveat: Flight distance is not yet a reviewed public metric.

rows.extracted_clue: For age >80 years and 500-999 m flight distance: minimum 370 m3/ha and minimum 25% Cw+Fd+Yc.
rows.public_proxy_use: Use if age, volume, species share, and flight/access proxy exist.
rows.p14_followup: P14.3 must build species-share, volume, age, and access-distance proxy fields.
rows.caveat: Flight distance is not yet a reviewed public metric.

rows.extracted_clue: For age >80 years and 1000+ m flight distance: minimum 400 m3/ha and minimum 30% Cw+Fd+Yc.
rows.public_proxy_use: Use if age, volume, species share, and flight/access proxy exist.
rows.p14_followup: P14.3 must build species-share, volume, age, and access-distance proxy fields.
rows.caveat: Flight distance is not yet a reviewed public metric.

rows.extracted_clue: MP11 assumes all conventionally operable areas become economically viable at some market point; only 20 ha of non-conventional uneconomic area are netted from THLB.
rows.public_proxy_use: Do not add a broad conventional uneconomic exclusion in Phase 14.
rows.p14_followup: Limit economic-operability rule work to heli/non-conventional sensitivity.
rows.caveat: Conventional economics are not a public cost model.

rows.extracted_clue: MP11 replaces prior ground/cable/helicopter DBH thresholds with 95% CMAI plus 350 m3/ha minimum volume.
rows.public_proxy_use: Do not use MP10 30/37/42 cm DBH rules as current MP11 criteria.
rows.p14_followup: Keep MHA implementation separate from harvest-system classifier.
rows.caveat: Historical DBH thresholds can be context only.

rows.source_detail: MP10 evidence summarized from local extracted text.
rows.extracted_clue: MP10 assigned conventionally operable 0-30% slopes to ground-based systems and steeper conventional slopes to cable.
rows.public_proxy_use: Use as a candidate proxy threshold to test, not as MP11 truth.
rows.p14_followup: P14.3 should compute slope-threshold sensitivity metrics including 30%.
rows.caveat: MP11 says ground and cable may be used together within operating areas.

rows.source_detail: P9D public DEM percent-slope zonal statistics.
rows.extracted_clue: CDED-derived slope stats exist for Step 210 active P9RF fragments with 60/70/80/90% thresholds.
rows.public_proxy_use: Use as coarse public slope evidence for first classifier pass.
rows.p14_followup: P14.3 must join or aggregate slope metrics onto candidate stands.
rows.caveat: CDED is coarse and not WFP LiDAR slope.

rows.source_detail: P9D selected Step 220 steep-slope public proxy.
rows.extracted_clue: Best whole-fragment candidate was slope_ge_70_prop_ge_0.75, deducting 1,801.705 ha against MP11 target 1,820 ha.
rows.public_proxy_use: Use as high-steepness context for inoperable/high-cost flags.
rows.p14_followup: Do not double-count Step 220 removed fragments as heli candidates.
rows.caveat: This is a netdown proxy, not a yarding-system rule.

rows.source_detail: P9E public TSM Class V proxy for MP11 Step 210.
rows.extracted_clue: Strict public TSM Class V source exists but deducts far less area than MP11, leaving a WFP DTSM/LiDAR semantic gap.
rows.public_proxy_use: Use as terrain-stability caveat/context, not direct harvest-system class.
rows.p14_followup: Carry terrain-stability status into classifier confidence/caveat fields.
rows.caveat: Low coverage prevents treating TSM as WFP terrain model equivalent.

rows.source_detail: P9.3 inventory and proxy field profile.
rows.extracted_clue: R1/VRI contains candidate low-height, low-volume, hembal-height3, age, species, volume, and stand-attribute fields.
rows.public_proxy_use: Use for volume/ha, age, height, and species-share classifier metrics.
rows.p14_followup: P14.3 must build Cw+Fd+Yc share and volume/age fields from candidate geometry.
rows.caveat: Inventory fields are public proxies and may not match WFP LiDAR/ITI values.

rows.extracted_clue: DRA roads for TFL 6 are present and readable: 10,706 features, 4,255.863 km.
rows.public_proxy_use: Candidate access-distance input for heli economic proxy.
rows.p14_followup: P14.3 should compute a distance-to-road/access proxy only after source path review.
rows.caveat: Road distance is not the same as MP11 helicopter flight distance.

rows.source_detail: P9.2 source-layer manifest private dependency row.
rows.extracted_clue: WFP LBB, ITI, and LEFI are marked unavailable_non_public.
rows.public_proxy_use: Use only as a documented gap.
rows.p14_followup: Keep private dependency gap visible in classifier QA and docs.
rows.caveat: Do not invent or publish proprietary source values.

boundary: This inventory mines evidence and public proxy candidates only. It does not generate classifier metrics, model-input tables, XML, Matrix Builder outputs, Patchworks runtime artifacts, or scenario outputs.
